boy.description: teenage boy with slim build, wearing a blue hooded raincoat, dark pants, wet hair partly hidden under hood, cautious expression

cat.description: small gray cat with sleek fur, bright eyes, pointed ears, long tail, expressive face as if speaking

street.description: quiet rainy city street at night with puddles, street lamps, dark building silhouettes, reflective wet pavement

umbrella.description: broken abandoned umbrella lying on wet pavement, bent ribs and torn fabric
